description: [Logistics ROI Analyst] [LLM] fleet_rightsize alpha+=3, beta+=-3 — Increasing the alpha for 'fleet_rightsize' will encourage more exploration of this option, which could improve save_rate by addressing cost-per-stop and fuel savings concerns for cost-driven churners.

[Operations Empathist] [LLM] pause_plan alpha+=3, beta+=-3 — The 'pause_plan' action already has a high win_rate and impressions, suggesting it is effective; boosting its confidence with adjusted priors should further improve save_rate without harming trust.

[Growth Retention Strategist] [LLM] context other|quarterly|control_graceful_exit alpha+=3, beta+=-3 — Improving the alpha for 'control_graceful_exit' in quarterly context can enhance its effectiveness as an intervention during less favorable business cycles, aligning with the strategy to match intervention to business cycle.

[Product Evangelist] [LLM] route_optimization_demo alpha+=3, beta+=-3 — Increasing the prior for 'route_optimization_demo' will help surface it more frequently for route_quality and low_usage churners, potentially closing more complaints by addressing feature-awareness gaps.

[Trust Guardian] [LLM] deny control_graceful_exit for job_change — Blocking high-pressure actions for 'job_change' reason aligns with the thesis to let go gracefully, potentially preventing erosion of trust and improving long-term save_rate.
